# JM OS - Official Feature List (v1.0.0)

Welcome to the future of fluidity. JM OS is built for power users who demand performance, privacy, and a premium aesthetic.

## 🚀 Performance & Core
- **Vortex Performance Engine**: Custom CPU governor tuning (`schedutil`) for instant response.
- **Dynamic zRAM**: 2GB of high-speed compressed virtual RAM (LZ4) for superior multitasking.
- **I/O Boost**: Increased read-ahead (2048KB) for lightning-fast app launches.
- **JM-Vortex-Kernel**: Branded kernel integration.

## 🎨 UI & Aesthetics (Cyber Cyan)
- **Cyber-Cyan Design System**: System-wide vibrant cyan accents and deep night blue themes.
- **Centered Clock**: A clean, balanced status bar layout.
- **Network Traffic Monitor**: Real-time speed tracking in the status bar.
- **Custom Carrier Label**: Branded "JM OS" status bar and lockscreen text.
- **Premium Typography**: Infrastructure ready for Inter / Google Sans fonts.
- **Expandable Brightness Slider**: Quick access to finer brightness control.
- **Modern Curvature**: Increased system-wide rounded corners (28dp) for a premium architectural feel.

## 🔒 Privacy & Advanced Features
- **Native Call Recording**: High-fidelity recording built directly into the Dialer.
- **Advanced Power Menu**: One-tap access to Recovery and Bootloader.
- **Signature Spoofing**: Built-in support for MicroG and privacy-focused services.
- **Parallel Space Ready**: Infrastructure for app cloning and managed profiles.

## 👆 Interaction & Gestures
- **Double-Tap to Wake (DT2W)**: Wake your device with a simple double-tap.
- **Double-Tap Status Bar to Sleep**: Quick sleep gesture on any screen.
- **30-Step Volume Control**: Finer precision for your media and calls.

## 🎵 Audio Experience
- **Custom System Sounds**: Unique Lock, Unlock, and Charging tones.
- **Boot Audio**: Branded startup sound support.
